_meta.description: Revenue breakdown geografico per ~50 ticker. Fonte: annual report 2024/2025, Bloomberg segmentation pubblica. Usato per filtrare esposizione reale a eventi specifici.

companies.name: ExxonMobil
companies.notes: Divestita Russia post-2022

companies.name: Chevron
companies.notes: Tengiz field Kazakhstan; Permian dominante

companies.name: TotalEnergies
companies.notes: Yamal LNG Russia (residuale); Qatar LNG significativo; Africa (Nigeria, Angola, Congo) importante

companies.name: BP PLC
companies.notes: Rosneft stake svalutato 2022 (-$25B). Residua esposizione operativa

companies.name: Shell PLC
companies.notes: LNG Australia e Qatar rilevanti; trading desk globale

companies.name: Lockheed Martin
companies.notes: 72% US gov. F-35 export a EU e Giappone. Middle East = Arabia Saudita, UAE, Israel

companies.name: RTX Corp
companies.notes: Pratt & Whitney motori commerciali (17% rev) = esposizione civile

companies.name: Northrop Grumman
companies.notes: Molto concentrato US gov (B-21, missile defense)

companies.name: General Dynamics
companies.notes: Gulfstream jets (corporate aviation) = 20% rev, sensibile recessione

companies.name: Delta Air Lines
companies.notes: Maggioranza domestico US. Hedging parziale fuel. Ogni +10% Brent = -$400M EBIT approx

companies.name: United Airlines
companies.notes: Più esposta Asia rispetto a DAL

companies.name: Frontline PLC
companies.notes: VLCC tanker. Rate cargo dipendono da rotte (Hormuz, Suez). Chiusura = spike noli +50-200%

companies.name: Nutrien
companies.notes: Russia+Belarus = 40% global potash. NTR produce in Saskatchewan. Beneficia da sanzioni Russia

companies.name: Mosaic Company
companies.notes: Fosfati + potash. Brasile 32% = esposizione BRL

companies.name: CF Industries
companies.notes: Nitrogen fertilizers. Costo dominato da gas naturale. UK/EU plants: esposizione gas EU

companies.name: Palo Alto Networks
companies.notes: B2B cybersecurity. Contratti gov US + enterprise globale

companies.name: CrowdStrike
companies.notes: SaaS security cloud-native

companies.name: Newmont
companies.notes: Mines in Nevada, Peru, Ghana, Australia, Suriname. Rischio politico EM

companies.name: Apple
companies.notes: Manufacturing 90%+ in Cina. Supply chain risk da escalation US-China

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.notes: Export controls H100/A100 vs Cina già attivi. Taiwan TSMC dependency critica

companies.name: TSMC
companies.notes: Fab principale Taiwan. Rischio geopolitico Taiwan Strait = esistenziale per ticker

companies.name: ASML
companies.notes: EUV restricted export a China (CAGR China revenue in decline). Beneficia da EU/US chip onshoring

companies.name: HSBC
companies.notes: Alta esposizione HK/Cina. Esposizione SWIFT/sanzioni se US-China escalation

companies.name: BNP Paribas
companies.notes: Esposizione Russia ridotta post-2022 ma non zero. Vulnerabile da sovereign crisis EU

companies.name: LVMH
companies.notes: Luxury: short in crisi, ma China consumer è il driver principale

companies.name: Airbus
companies.notes: Russia: 150+ jet impounded 2022, ~$2B loss. China: backlog a rischio escalation

companies.name: ENI SpA
companies.notes: Alta Africa (Libia, Nigeria, Congo, Mozambico). Rischio geopolitico MENA alto

companies.name: Enel
companies.notes: Utility. Sensibile a gas EU price shock

companies.name: STMicroelectronics
companies.notes: Auto + industrial semis. Supply chain EU. Beneficia da CHIPS Act
